title: Nation Still In Mourning: Grief Remains Fresh One Year After Deadliest Ahmedabad Air India Crash - 260 Lives Lost, Many Questions Still Unanswered
description: A year has passed since the Air India crash in Ahmedabad, but grief and questions remain for victim families. The Boeing 787-8 Dreamliner, flying from Ahmedabad to London Gatwick, crashed shortly after takeoff on June 12, hitting a busy road and a student hostel mess. The tragedy killed 260 people – 241 on the plane and 19 on the ground, with only one survivor.
